title: centaurium umbellatum subsp. suffruticosum
intro: Centaurium umbellatum subsp. suffruticosum is a subspecies of the greater centaury plant, a perennial herb native to Europe and parts of Asia, characterized by its delicate purple flowers and woody stems. The medicinal properties of Centaurium umbellatum subsp. suffruticosum lie in its ability to inhibit inflammation and its antioxidant properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving sleep quality, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Centaurium umbellatum subsp. suffruticosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
